scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:agent" --names ui,agent --prefix-colors blue,green --kill-others-on-fail
scripts.dev:agent: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const { win32 } = require('node:path'); const command = '.' + win32.sep + 'scripts' + win32.sep + 'run-agent.bat'; const result = process.platform === 'win32' ? spawnSync('cmd.exe', ['/d', '/c', command], { stdio: 'inherit' }) : spawnSync('sh', ['./scripts/run-agent.sh'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.install:agent: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const { win32 } = require('node:path'); const command = '.' + win32.sep + 'scripts' + win32.sep + 'setup-agent.bat'; const result = process.platform === 'win32' ? spawnSync('cmd.exe', ['/d', '/c', command], { stdio: 'inherit' }) : spawnSync('sh', ['./scripts/setup-agent.sh'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
